hooks.command: FILE=$(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_paths[0] // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
cd app 2>/dev/null && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15; exit 0
cd app 2>/dev/null && STUBS=$(grep -rn '() => {}\|() => { }\|// TODO\|not implemented' src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$STUBS" -gt 0 ] && echo "WARNING: $STUBS stub(s) found" >&2; exit 0

FILE=$(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'docs/SPEC.md\|docs/tasks/' && echo 'BLOCKED: Spec and task files are read-only.' >&2 && exit 2; exit 0

cd app 2>/dev/null && [ -f package.json ] && { ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || true); STUBS=$(grep -rn '() => {}\|() => { }\|// TODO' src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); FILES=$(find src -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.ts' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "STATUS: ${FILES} files, ${ERRORS} TS errors, ${STUBS} stubs"; }; exit 0
cd app 2>/dev/null && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15; exit 0
